programme.title: Reset - Season 1 - Greece, Euphoria Retreat
programme.desc: In this episode of Reset, embark on a transformative journey to Euphoria Retreat.A mystical place offering a holistic approach to well-being aimed at restoring balance between body, mind and soul.After a long struggle with illness, its founder embarked on a personal quest to find balance. An in-depth reflection which resulted in the creation of a place where one could share and transmit this method of well-being. Euphoria Retreat is a clever blend of Taoist and Hellenic philosophy based on the symbolism of the five elements: water, wood, fire, earth and metal. Ancestral wisdom and scientific advances offer a transformative immersion in self-discovery. The tools developed by Euphoria...

programme.title: Reset - Season 1 - Italy, Palazzo Fiuggi
programme.desc: In this episode of Reset we discover Palazzo Fiuggi, a haven of well-being located in the heart of the natural springs of Fiuggi, famous for their purifying and healing powers.The Palazzo was born from the vision of a science and health enthusiast. This historic place of well-being offers exclusive medical-scientific therapies combining the healing properties of water with advances in Western medicine and alternative medicines. Upon arrival, a team of specialists carries out a targeted diagnosis to create a personalized protocol, rebalancing the mind, body and soul, with a simple promise: offering a longer and better-lived life.A constantly evolving method, between ancestral wisdom and...

programme.title: My Day Dubai - Season 1 - The Banan Beach
programme.desc: Gabriela wakes up in a tent at Banan Beach in Dubai and gets inspired by Raha Moharrak the first Saudi women who climbed the Mount Everest and seven highest summits. Afterwards the two have kitesurf lessons and lots of fun. Gabriela ends her day with some dance flow yoga with her trainer Steph by sunset.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook - Season 4 - Poultry on the menu
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Poultry on the menu
programme.desc: Julie heads for Burgundy to discover ancient breeds of poultry reintroduced to France thanks to the work of breeder Fred Ménager. We'll then move on to Auvergne to discover how the famous Label Rouge is awarded and the role of certifying bodies ... because it's important to know what ends up on our plates. Julie also travels to the Drôme to cook guinea fowl, before heading to the Périgord to prepare a turkey stew. Julie will then head back up towards the center to discover an amazing fly maker who uses rooster feathers!

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 1 - Floating Yoga
programme.desc: Just Float, this is the latest yoga trend and mantra for an relaxed mind. As you enter a fully soundproof studio and float in vats filled with epson salts, you will disconnect from the urban buzz. That is Val’s promise as she takes us to experience this funny trend. With a sain mind comes a sain body: it’s time to head to Clover Juice, the most famous juice address in Los Angeles. As we make our way through Clover’s kitchen, we discover this way of life, mix and learn more on these beverage’s benefits.

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 1 - Animal Farm
programme.desc: In this episode, we will go to a ranch, which is a real sanctuary for animals. The animals are king and the llama is the star. This center takes in animals to give them a safer and happier life in a beautiful setting. Then Val will participate in a Namastday Yoga session, another trend in yoga involving ropes hanging from the ceiling, acrobatic poses and great flexibility.

programme.title: My First Garden - Season 1 - Planting vegetables in the fall
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Planting vegetables in the fall
programme.desc: We meet in the market garden of Romainville, to continue installing vegetables in the vegetable garden. Yes, it is possible, even in autumn. Because if it's true that most vegetables are planted in spring or summer, some varieties can be planted in early autumn and are fast-growing, which will allow you to harvest them in late autumn or early winter. Let's get started! We're going to plant winter spinach together and we'll show you a little trick you need to know to harvest it properly.

programme.title: Minute Bowl - Season 1 - Rainbow bowl
programme.desc: In this episode, we put some color on your plate by preparing a rainbow bowl. For this you'll need quinoa, carrot, avocado, cucumber, radish, chioggia beet, pomegranate and buckwheat seeds, and mint. This bowl is composed by different colored vegetables which allows us to fill up with nutrients, minerals and vitamins. The look of a nice dish makes us secrete more digestive enzymes.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 3 - Claire
programme.desc: One woman’s personal mission to reduce her household rubbish turned into a passion that gave birth to Southeast Asia’s first Zero-Waste Bulk Food shop. Claire is a driven and successful mother of three who turned away from her corporate job to channel her business-savvy into reducing our impact on the environment and contributing to the improvement of her local community.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Zaira (Argentina)
programme.desc: For a long time Zaira let herself be defined solely as a survivor of the traumatic sexual assault that marked her life. In her healing search, she left behind the busy city life and moved to seek solace in the mountains of Mendoza. It is among these magnificent peaks that Zaira found peace within herself and harmony with her surroundings. Now, eager to help others heal, she is the leader of a trekking initiative that doubles as a support group for other women who are victims of sexual aggression.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Ile (Argentina)
programme.desc: Ileana studied business and worked long hours indoors for a multinational logistics company. Her love for dance and desire for movement drove her to quit her corporate life and begin a new chapter as a fitness trainer. Quickly exhausting the traditional methods available at her local gyms, she began to create innovative and groundbreaking exercise methods of her own. Her goal: to empower women by making them feel strong and feminine at the same time.

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 2 - So the great rivers may live - Part 1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 So the great rivers may live - Part 1
programme.desc: Water and its beauty, water and its power, water and its fragility... the water we all need is becoming scarce, through our own fault. Some rivers are dry, others are diverted, cut off by dams, others are simply polluted, and this for decades. We will discover how humans transformed the nature in Argentina, then in China and its disproportionate Three Gorges Dam. We will also go in Botswana with the Okavango, this unique river which flows into a desert forming the famous Okavango Delta. Vu du Ciel makes you discover once again another world, magnificent but threatened.

programme.title: Audio advices - Season 5 - Differential relaxation
programme.desc: This exercise helps you develop what we call differential relaxation. The aim is to learn to relax the entire body except the parts necessary to the proper development of an action. For example, when you're working in the office, your back and your arms are often extremely contracted when really only your eyes and hands are involved in the task.

programme.title: Reset - Season 1 - France, Le Bruit de l'eau
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 France, Le Bruit de l'eau
programme.desc: In this episode of Reset, we take you to “Le Bruit de l'eau”, an ecolodge nestled in the heart of the Baie de Somme nature reserve, in France. In the middle of nature, discover a place of absolute serenity inspired by the Japanese lifestyle and the travels of a great reporter, its founder.The intimate atmosphere that reigns at Le Bruit de l'eau (The Sound of Water) envelops you in a soothing calm, creating a cocoon made for relaxation and personal rejuvenation.This ecolodge allows us to cultivate awareness of the present moment and to open up to a fulfilling perception of our environment. Le Bruit de l'eau opens the doors to a transformative experience, where beauty of the natural...

programme.title: Reset - Season 1 - Sri Lanka, Santani
programme.desc: In this episode of Reset, we fly to Sri Lanka to discover an old tea plantation transformed into a sumptuous refuge: Santani.In order to find an alternative to the stress of urban life, the hotel offers a modern approach to Ayurveda. This traditional Indian medicine aims to establish a balance between the individual and the world around them. Thanks to the development of a personalized program, each visitor is invited to find harmony within this restorative sanctuary.Santani was created by a Sri Lankan eager to preserve our physical and spiritual well-being in a peaceful and healthy place to reconnect with the world differently. Let's discover a holistic approach to health, including...

programme.title: My Day Dubai - Season 1 - Atlantis
programme.desc: In this episode, our presenter Gabriela will visit Sustainable City in Dubai. She will discover how the residents garden, how they dress in sustainable clothes and, of course, how they eat by preparing healthy recipes. She will end her day with a Qigong class with a Qigong master.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook - Season 4 - The flavors of chocolate
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The flavors of chocolate
programme.desc: Today, the gluttons should not be disappointed since chocolate is in the spotlight. Discovered by the Mayans 2500 years ago and then more widely by the Aztecs, chocolate is today one of the favorite products in the world. And make no mistake about it: just as the kitchen has its great chefs, chocolate also has its great chocolatiers.As for recipes, Julie will introduce you to a cake that is only made in Saint Émilien and which combines chocolate with macarons, before heading to the Basque Country for a dessert to spice you up. We will then climb up the mountain to meet a Swiss cook. Finally, you will see that chocolate has several surprises in store for us: it has many virtues and is...

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 1 - Hotel on Pacific
programme.desc: Val takes us to one of the most beautiful hotels in California: The Belmont Hotel! Much more than a hotel, this place is a natural haven where everything is made to relax while overlooking the Pacific. While relaxation is key, we also seek adventures, don’t we? While in this dream setting, we will practice yoga among the turtles, walk around the vertical and organic garden with the Chef and treat ourselves with a massage with essential oils coming directly from the garden.

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 1 - Surfing & Vineyards
programme.desc: Yoga and Surf are two corner stones of the Californian spirit. In this episode, the best of both worlds meets as Val shares a surf session with a local champion from Malibu! What about the surfing outfit ? No need for it, there is a yoga mat. Let’s head to Ojai, in the middle of a vineyards, and joint the "Topa Wines" group for a yoga session at the sunset. Together, we will enjoy the "Pink moment": the time when Ojai’s mountains turn pink and your mind is blown away.

programme.title: My First Garden - Season 1 - Repotting an indoor plant
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Repotting an indoor plant
programme.desc: We meet in the market garden of Romainville to learn how to take good care of our indoor plants. The plants that grow in our houses and flats are grown in pots. And when we buy a new plant, it is very important to repot it. The plants we buy come in pots that are often too small for them to grow well. That's why you put it in a bigger pot.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Agostina (Argentina)
programme.desc: When Agostina’s mother was diagnosed with breast cancer, she began seeking out soft natural fabrics that would not irritate her mother’s sensitive skin. She found it almost impossible to find the right materials, so she decided to make her own. Research led her to bamboo fibers and she realised she could make a positive impact on the environment, while developing sustainable and ethical fashion.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Solenn (Nantes)
programme.desc: A former school teacher reinvents herself when she discovers a passion for sharing other women’s stories. Always inspired by the journeys of strong women, Solenn began a blog to celebrate the women in her community. Solenn’s energy and passion fueled a dream of starting her own magazine. Thanks to a successful crowdfunding campaign, this dream blossomed into a professional career in journalism and she launched a print mook (magazine & book) called Etonnantes. Etonnantes features interviews of women of all backgrounds, celebrating their diversity and success in each field.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Sophie (Nantes)
programme.desc: Always an artist at heart, Sophie grew up in the countryside amongst nature and farm animals. Her love for creating art while respecting nature turned into a drive to seek out sustainable vegetable dyes.Today, her artwork and craft are intertwined as she makes beautiful prints and motifs that she colours with natural dyes, prepared from handpicked variety of flowers and plants that turn into stunning creations.

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 2 - So the great rivers may live - Part 2
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 So the great rivers may live - Part 2
programme.desc: Yann Arthus-Bertrand thus continues his world tour and his inventory of the planet with the great rivers that suffer from man's excesses as a common thread. " So the great rivers may live" is the discovery of places, men and women who are fighting so that our waterways simply have their place on Earth. Thanks to his genius, man is correcting his mistakes: the Aral Sea, which once disappeared, is coming back. In New York, millions of people have drinking water thanks to the natural virtues of the forest.

programme.title: Audio advices - Season 5 - Joint relaxation
programme.desc: The joints are the first parts of the body to react badly to stress, therefore it is essential to relax and relieve them as often as possible. Some ankle and knee rotations, combined with calm, controlled breathing will allow you to soothe your joints. With a few simple, well-targeted exercises, this session will bring you deep relaxation.

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 2 - Of Forests and Men - Part 2
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Of Forests and Men - Part 2
programme.desc: The call of the Forest is about discovering places but above all it is about meeting those who protect this priceless heritage. Forests are essential to mankind. They capture CO2, promote the formation of clouds and therefore rain, protect the soil from erosion and provide a habitat for wildlife. From Madagascar, to France, to Cameroon, or even Eritrea, Yann Arthus-Bertrand sets out to discover the most beautiful forests, those who live in them, those who protect them and those who live off them.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook - Season 4 - The cheese menu
programme.desc: Today, Julie sets on the roads of France to talk about an essential product on French tables: cheese. More than a gourmet craze, more than an end-of-meal treat, cheese is associated with French gastronomy, and is also recognized as Intangible Cultural Heritage by UNESCO. With nearly 1,000 varieties (soft cheeses, cooked, blue-veined, pressed cheeses…), the French are the biggest consumers of cheese in the world!

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 2 - Martial Arts and meditation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Martial Arts and meditation
programme.desc: Today, we will meet in Santa Monica in the hub of the last healthy trends. Val will make us discover Erewhon, the biggest organic and hipster supermarket in Los Angeles. She will then meet Troy, a guru of healthy consciousness, for an outdoor class that mixes martial arts and meditation. Then, on the legendary "Muscle Beach", the beach of all athletes, we will meet David, an action movie double, for a very aerial workout.

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 2 - Hotel Paseo, Palm Springs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Hotel Paseo, Palm Springs
programme.desc: Val takes us to discover Palm Springs, the trendy and designer city in the heart of the California desert. In the heart of a private collection, we will discover all the flora of this region: an outdoor plant museum, one of the largest collections of cacti, and even tequila flowers. Then we'll head to the Paséo Hotel, one of the zen and design hotels of Palm Springs, where we'll meet the chef of the restaurant who will concoct his signature dishes. We will end our day with a relaxing massage with crystals.

programme.title: My First Garden - Season 1 - Carving a Halloween pumpkin
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Carving a Halloween pumpkin
programme.desc: We meet again in the market garden of Romainville, for a special Halloween episode. In one of our first episodes, we learned how to sow a pumpkin seed. The pumpkins, which I had installed in my vegetable garden, have grown well now that we are in autumn. And that's good because today we're going to show you how to dig a pumpkin to make a beautiful Halloween lantern.

programme.title: Vegetarian Delights - Season 1 - Potato cutlets with vegetable purée
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Potato cutlets with vegetable purée
programme.desc: In this recipe, we'll prepare delicious potato cutlets accompanied by a creamy vegetable purée. The cutlets are crispy on the outside with Japanese breadcrumbs and tender on the inside, while the celeriac puree adds a touch of sweetness and lightness. This dish is perfect for a comforting and tasty vegetarian meal.

programme.title: Vegetarian Delights - Season 1 - Creamy cauliflower soup
programme.desc: In this recipe, we'll prepare a creamy, comforting cauliflower and celeriac velouté. This mild, delicate soup is spiced up with condiments like paprika, garlic and oregano, and a touch of olive oil for an even more gourmet texture. An ideal dish for a light starter or a warming dinner.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 2 - Paul John Elliott
programme.desc: Without really knowing why, Paul Elliott will change his life from cartoonist to massage therapist. Aspired by success, money, success, he will create several clinics and will eventually lose the human aspects and lose himself. A new turn, a new meeting and Paul will finally resume his dreams of painting. Follow Paul in his tumults and his happiness found.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 2 - Annabelle Higgins and Valérie Sirois
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Annabelle Higgins and Valérie Sirois
programme.desc: They are beautiful sisters, they are passionate about nature and they have a very strong common point: entrepreneurship. After years of evolution in consumer sectors, discover Annabelle and Valérie who knew how to listen to their passion to create a fitness and surf club (for Annabelle) and a zero waste grocery store (for Valérie).

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 2 - Véronick Desmarais
programme.desc: The everyday work is not always easy and it is sometimes difficult to get by. If there is one thing that Véronick has learned from her experience and those around her, it is because she is able to surpass that and to embark on her dreams and plans to become a massage therapist. You will believe in your abilities too.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 2 - Violaine Courtois
programme.desc: Everything started from the dream of her parents, she becomes a veterinarian. In her career that she launched backwards, Violaine will meet people who will take her to a different path of life. The chance will be at the rendezvous but it is especially the courage to resume studies and create his company that will build his project. Follow the encounters and travels of Violaine that brought her to fasciatherapy and nonviolent communication.

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 3 - Nature’s Heroes: Gabon - Part 2
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Nature’s Heroes: Gabon - Part 2
programme.desc: The incredible diversity of flora and fauna, the fight against climate change, the balance between growth and sustainable development: these are all battles being fought on five continents. Yann Arthus-Bertrand takes us on this expedition. We're off to Gabon to discover the Ivindo National Park and Port-Gentil, then on to Sri Lanka in Kandi. Back to Gabon we go to Libreville, then Lambaréné to talk about turtles and the health of the local people. Finally, off to Dhaka-Bangladesh.

programme.desc: Is work stressing you out? Are you tired of the routine? Here's a series of relaxation exercises to help you unwind 100%.

programme.title: Audio advices - Season 5 - After sitting for a long time
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 After sitting for a long time
programme.desc: Is work stressing you out? Are you tired of the routine? Here's a series of relaxation exercises to help you unwind 100%.

programme.title: Audio advices - Season 5 - Lower body relaxation
programme.desc: This exercise aims to release all the tension you can feel in your legs and feet. You will first be invited to quickly relieve the upper body so you can then concentrate more easily on the rest. Then, with a series of muscle contractions and decontractions, you will deeply relax your legs and feet. You'll notice you'll feel much better overall.

programme.title: Audio advices - Season 1 - Get in contact with your needs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Get in contact with your needs
programme.desc: Need to regenerate your body? Take the time to make some exercices to decompress and find a peaceful harmony.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 3 - Nature’s Heroes: Gabon - Part 1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Nature’s Heroes: Gabon - Part 1
programme.desc: How can we reconcile the development needed to sustain the lives of nearly seven billion people with the protection of the Earth's natural resources? Yann Arthus-Bertrand and his team have chosen Gabon to continue their survey of the planet. We'll be discovering the Kongou Falls, the Langoué clearing with their elephant in Gabon. Then in Colombia, we will go on the island of Malpelo with their shark. Back to Gabon we will discover the Minkébé National Park and the bats in Franceville. We will also go to India in Hyderabad, which has convinced farmers to use no pesticides and no GMOs in their cultivation.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook - Season 4 - Citrus flavors
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrénées Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte d'Azur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While we're all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 2 - Topanga Canyon, AMBA Yoga
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Topanga Canyon, AMBA Yoga
programme.desc: Val goes to the heart of Topanga Canyon, California, a favorite spot for yoga addicts and nature lovers. Here she will experience AMBA Yoga, a kind of hollistic yoga for women. We will also attend a Sound Bowl session, a Tibetan practice considered the ultimate in meditation. In the heart of Venice Beach, we will discover the "Plant Lab", a new high-tech application that records the vibrations of plants to create music. Finally, Val will present us the largest concept store of rare crystals in South America.

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 2 - Hot Springs
programme.desc: Still in Palm Springs, we will discover the Parker Hotel, the most trendy and design hotel in town. A French chef will take us to cook in the middle of nature. Then, Val will go to Desert Springs, a town known for its natural hot springs. At one of the many spas in town, Val will test one of the springs and even attend a Sound Bowl session.

programme.title: My First Garden - Season 1 - Growing mushrooms at home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Growing mushrooms at home
programme.desc: We meet at the Romainville market garden centre to learn how to grow mushrooms at home. Some varieties, such as button mushrooms, oyster mushrooms or shiitake mushrooms, grow quite easily in mushroom houses. But you too can do it. And today we will show you how to make a miniature version of this kit to grow oyster mushrooms at home.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: Vegetarian Delights - Season 1 - Mashed potatoes with vegetable gravy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Mashed potatoes with vegetable gravy
programme.desc: In this recipe, we prepare mashed potatoes in vegetable stock. The mashed potatoes are soft and melt-in-the-mouth, while the richly flavored broth of bell bell pepper, carrot, zucchini, celeriac and tomato enhances the whole.

programme.title: Vegetarian Delights - Season 1 - Sweet potato bruschetta
programme.desc: In this recipe, we reinvent the classic bruschetta by replacing the bread with a roasted sweet potato base. Garnished with tomatoes, guacamole, chilli pepper and a drizzle of olive oil, this healthy and tasty bruschetta is perfect for an aperitif or a light starter.

programme.title: Earth in Sports - Season 5 - Episode 11
programme.desc: The TV show Earth in Sports will immerse you into the point of view of different athlete who are practicing extreme or peaceful sports at the best spot all around the world. You will discover the most beautiful landscapes and some of them are nearly impossible to reach.

programme.title: Earth in Sports - Season 5 - Episode 12
programme.desc: The TV show Earth in Sports will immerse you into the point of view of different athlete who are practicing extreme or peaceful sports at the best spot all around the world. You will discover the most beautiful landscapes and some of them are nearly impossible to reach.

programme.title: Earth in Sports - Season 5 - Episode 13
programme.desc: The TV show Earth in Sports will immerse you into the point of view of different athlete who are practicing extreme or peaceful sports at the best spot all around the world. You will discover the most beautiful landscapes and some of them are nearly impossible to reach.

programme.title: Earth in Sports - Season 5 - Episode 14
programme.desc: The TV show Earth in Sports will immerse you into the point of view of different athlete who are practicing extreme or peaceful sports at the best spot all around the world. You will discover the most beautiful landscapes and some of them are nearly impossible to reach.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Carine (Nice)
programme.desc: After twenty years as a lawyer, Carine decided to give in to her desire to help others heal. Her inner journey led her to discover a passion for naturopathy as she rediscovered her love for nature and learned the healing qualities of the plants around her. Combined with a deep understanding of astrology and nutrition, she is now able to help others live better and find their own path.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Virginie (Lyon)
programme.desc: Virginie’s beautiful handwritten lettering decorates the walls and windows of many shops in and around Lyon, France, as she lives out her passion of finding beauty in every stroke. A former waitress, Virginie was struggling to find her calling when she suffered a life-altering horse accident that almost left her handicapped. At only 30, she was forced to put her whole life into perspective. She finally found herself through a love for graphic design and lettering, combined with a desire for freedom that came with working independently. To motivate other women, she has also launched “Ladyboss”, a network of inspiring women entrepreneurs.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Laetitia (French Alps)
programme.desc: While pregnant with her daughter, Laetitia, a former journalist, experienced a strong desire to change lifestyles and move to the countryside. Remembering the teachings of her grandmother, she began to venture outdoors into the surrounding Alps and study the different plants at her fingertips. Today she holds a wealth of knowledge about the medicinal and aromatherapeutic value of plants that she applies to making natural products. With utmost respect for the environment, Laetitia gathers only what she needs in order to make herbal infusions.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 4 - Louise (Oleron Island)
programme.desc: At only 20 years old, Louise is full of confidence and already achieved a personal dream of hers to share her passion for nutritious and locally-sourced ingredients on the island of Oleron, France. Repurposing a camping car, she set up a brunch and tea-time spot where the guests can hand-pick their ingredients in the adjacent organic fields. Louise transforms the ingredients into favourite creations of hers and even joins her father for boat trips when she needs to stock up on fresh fish for the menu!

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 3 - Japan: Mass consumption - What the labels forget to mention - Part 1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Japan: Mass consumption - What the labels forget to mention - Part 1
programme.desc: In this instalment, Yann Arthus-Bertrand lifts the veil on the products people buy. Almost everything we buy has a direct impact on our environment. We head to Japan to talk about the impact of new technologies, then to the Republic of Congo in Bukavu for the coltan harvest. How does our total consumption affect the environment? What permanent brands are we imposing on our planet? How can we differentiate between useful and useless purchases?

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Chryso Lefou prepares savory stuffed vine leaves, a classic Mediterranean favorite. She also makes a sweet banana cake drizzled with honey and tahini, combining traditional flavors with a touch of indulgence. A delightful episode celebrating the best of Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos

This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Malini Egypt

programme.title: Il Provinciale
programme.sub-title: S01:E05 Sicilia camminando lungo I secoli
programme.desc: Federico Quaranta journeys through Sicily’s Val di Noto, in the province of Syracuse, tracing the legacy of ancient civilisations. His path leads from the Archaeological Park of Neapolis to the historic town of Buscemi, concluding on the scenic coastline of the Vendicari Nature Reserve.

programme.title: Tuscanys Dolce Vita
programme.desc: We enjoy the charms of rural Tuscany's "sweet life" as we hunt for truffles in an oak forest, nibble on artichokes, and cruise through cypress groves in a classic convertible.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.sub-title: S01:E03 Greek Myths: Hermes - The Impenetrable Messenger
programme.desc: Follow Hermes, the clever and mischievous messenger of the gods. Born with wit and speed, he invents the lyre, steals Apollo’s cattle, and guides souls to the Underworld. Hermes’ myth reveals a god who moves freely between worlds, embodying trickery, invention, and transition.

Then, the journey continues with Kattimeria, fried sweet flatbreads that balance crisp texture with a hint of indulgent sweetness. Together, these recipes showcase the comforting richness and variety of Cyprus’s culinary heritage.

programme.title: Io Ti Cerchero
programme.sub-title: S01:E03 Io Ti Cerchero - Il Cercatore EP3
programme.desc: Valerio uncovers new witnesses who claim Ettore was thrown into the river, not a suicide. This deepens his suspicions of foul play. Meanwhile, a fabricated diary surfaces, accusing Valerio and undermining his investigation.

programme.title: Cose da fare prima dei 30
programme.desc: Olivia, determined more than ever to follow her dream, is ready to do anything to record her album. Francesco, who invested all his savings in the supermarket, receives a bad surprise. Eros tries to ingratiate himself with Martina, the nerd of the class, to raise the average of his grades.

programme.title: Medea
programme.desc: The tragic tale of Medea, a powerful sorceress betrayed by her lover, Jason. Consumed by rage and heartbreak, she enacts a devastating revenge. The story delves into love, betrayal, and the dark extremes of human emotion.

programme.title: Madame Butterfly Teatro Alla Scala 2016
programme.desc: In Madama Butterfly (Teatro alla Scala, 2016), a young Japanese woman enters into a marriage with an American naval officer, filled with hope for a new life. As time passes, the contrast between her expectations and reality becomes more profound. The opera unfolds with deep emotional intensity, leading to a powerful and poignant conclusion.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.sub-title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.desc: On April 28, 2022, esteemed conductor Fabio Luisi and acclaimed pianist Alexander Gadjiev took the stage at the Auditorium Rai "Arturo Toscanini" in Turin, accompanied by the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai. Gadjiev delivered a masterful performance of Chopin’s Piano Concerto No. 2, while Luisi led a captivating interpretation of Strauss’ "Aus Italien".

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Whats On Italy Art and Innovation
programme.sub-title: Whats On Italy Art and Innovation
programme.desc: Italy’s cultural calendar spans music, photography, and classical performance, from the contemporary sounds of Limbo Festival and Nameless Festival to the open-air spectacle of La Fenice in Piazza San Marco. Visual storytelling takes focus at Cortona on the Move, while operatic tradition is celebrated at the Puccini Festival, highlighting Italy’s enduring influence on Mediterranean arts and culture.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature Ep 5
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Med Destination - Dubrovnik
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Minds 03 Cleopatra
programme.desc: Cleopatra, the last Pharaoh of Egypt, captivated empires with her intelligence, charm, and enduring influence.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Tuscany
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Tuscany, one of Italy’s most picturesque and beloved regions. From rolling vineyards and medieval hill towns to art-filled cities, she discovers the essence of la dolce vita. Malini enjoys local wine tastings, traditional Tuscan dishes, and breathtaking landscapes, capturing the timeless charm and warmth that make Tuscany truly unforgettable.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slowing down to savor Burgundy's historic, scenic, and edible delights, we revel in the rich traditions of this serene region, where nature is as sophisticated as the people.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 4
programme.desc: Chryso Lefou makes a light and tasty Mediterranean dish with fresh pasta, colourful mint pesto, and juicy cherry tomatoes. She makes crispy fried almond fingers (Dactyla) for dessert, which adds a nutty, sweet finish. A delectable blend of decadent treats and savoury, fresh flavours.

programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Whats On Slovenia Alpine to Adriatic
programme.sub-title: Whats On Slovenia Alpine to Adriatic
programme.desc: Slovenia’s event calendar blends folklore, heritage, and contemporary culture, from the playful traditions of Carnival in Cerknica to the Saltworks Festival, celebrating coastal history and local identity. Modern creativity comes to the fore at LUV Fest, reflecting the country’s evolving cultural expression within the Mediterranean and Adriatic region.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: A perfect balance of savory and sweet with orzo, chicken, and colorful peppers, a vibrant Mediterranean-inspired dish. For dessert, rich, chocolatey brownies provide a decadent finish. An episode celebrating simple, flavorful cooking paired with indulgent treats.

programme.title: Med Nations 02 Greece
programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. From the ancient wonders of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, Greece shows this. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Blockchain in Real Estate Panel
programme.desc: As blockchain moves from theory to practice, this panel examines its growing role in real estate. Speakers unpack how decentralised systems are changing transactions, ownership records, and trust, while addressing the challenges of regulation, scalability, and industry readiness in today’s market.

programme.title: Med Nations 02 Greece
programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. From the ancient wonders of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, Greece shows this. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Fenici e Greci gli Antichi negli Oceani
programme.sub-title: Fenici e Greci gli Antichi negli Oceani
programme.desc: From the ancient ruins of Tharros in Sardinia, we retrace the epic era of maritime exploration and colonisation by the Greeks and Phoenicians, stretching from the Black Sea to the Atlantic. At Palazzo Massimo in Rome, a first-century mosaic featuring a pineapple offers a fascinating clue—fuelling the theory that ancient sailors may have reached as far as the Americas.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.sub-title: S03:E03 Normandy War Torn Yet Full Of Life
programme.desc: With its thought-provoking sights, delicious cuisine, and idyllic coastline, it's no wonder Normandy is both a Mecca for history buffs and a popular getaway for Parisians.

programme.title: Whats On Portugal Colours of the Coast
programme.sub-title: Whats On Portugal Colours of the Coast
programme.desc: Portugal’s coastline becomes a stage for tradition, art, and contemporary expression, from the vibrant rituals of Festa das Cruzes, to the colourful installations of The Umbrella Sky Project transforming public spaces, and the Walk & Talk Biennale, where art, architecture, and community intersect across the landscape.

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Napoli
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Naples, in Italy’s vibrant Campania region. She dives into the city’s beautiful chaos to uncover the heart of Neapolitan culture, sampling delicious street food, meeting friendly locals, and exploring its rich history. With its authenticity and energy, Naples stands out as one of Italy’s most captivating cities.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: MED Destination LJUBLJANA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The flavors of land and sea are brought together in the kitchen, with prawn linguine, a light and savory pasta dish brimming with fresh Mediterranean seafood. For dessert, galaktompoureko, a traditional Greek custard-filled pastry with golden, crispy layers, provides a sweet and indulgent finale. An episode celebrating the best of classic Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Brač (Supetar)
programme.desc: On Brač, famed for its white stone, Zlatni Rat beach, and Vidova Gora, we stopped in Supetar to taste tradition. Restaurateur Teo Dragičević served us šporka juha, mišanca, and vitalac—authentic island flavors rooted in Brač’s rich culinary heritage.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Whats On Slovenia Alpine to Adriatic
programme.sub-title: Whats On Slovenia Alpine to Adriatic
programme.desc: Slovenia’s event calendar blends folklore, heritage, and contemporary culture, from the playful traditions of Carnival in Cerknica to the Saltworks Festival, celebrating coastal history and local identity. Modern creativity comes to the fore at LUV Fest, reflecting the country’s evolving cultural expression within the Mediterranean and Adriatic region.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.sub-title: S06:E03 Dubrovnik and Balkan Side Trips
programme.desc: Exploring Croatia, Montenegro, and Bosnia, we’ll get to know the three major groups of the former Yugoslavia, Croats, Serbs, and Bosniaks, before enjoying a bit of fun in the sun along the Adriatic in Dubrovnik.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Andalucia
programme.desc: Join Angelica Malini on an unforgettable journey through Andalucía, southern Spain’s most colorful and captivating region, as they explore Cordoba and Cadiz. Famous for flamenco, tapas, and stunning Moorish architecture, Andalucía’s rich history comes alive here. In Cordoba, the host marvels at the breathtaking Mezquita, a grand mosque turned cathedral. In Cadiz, an ancient Phoenician city, they soak in sweeping Atlantic views and a corniche with hints of North Africa. This episode immerses viewers in the culture, history, and vibrant spirit of one of Spain’s most enchanting regions.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We explore the dramatic castles, prehistoric cave paintings, and prized cuisine of the Dordogne River Valley, with its unforgettable blend of man-made and natural beauty.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.sub-title: S01:E13 Greek Myths: Psyche - Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: The tale of Psyche, a mortal of extraordinary beauty, sparks the jealousy of Venus, who sends her son Cupid to curse her with a monstrous love. Instead, Psyche captures Cupid's heart, but her betrayal of his trust breaks their fragile bond. Determined to reunite with him, Psyche endures a series of divine trials. In the end, the gods grant her immortality, and their love prevails—an enduring myth of trust, redemption, and the power of true devotion.

programme.title: Opera - Salome
programme.desc: The 87th Festival of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino opens with Richard Strauss's Salome, conducted by Alexander Soddy. Directed by Emma Dante, this new production features Lidia Fridman as Salome, Anna Maria Chiuri as Herodias, and Nikolai Schukoff as Herodes. The performance blends Strauss's intense musical drama with a fresh and dynamic staging.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 Mammut Athlete Profile Dani Arnold - The Art of Iceclimbing
programme.desc: Daniel Arnold was born in 1984 in the Swiss canton of Uri and grew up in the small mountain village of Biel in the heart of the Swiss Alps. Dani and his brother experience all aspects of mountain life: hiking, skiing and climbing in some of the toughest climbing locations in the world

programme.title: WOF Evergreens

programme.sub-title: S02 : E80 Where the Truth Lies
