programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Crow and Shay soar down the track in a high-flying battle where the loser will crash land into the underground!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E82 Warriors of the Air
programme.desc: Shay and Crow's winged warriors fight, claw and flap towards the finale…until an unexpected guest decides to join their duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E83 A Matter of Trust
programme.desc: Zuzu’s on the run from Sector Security, but can a little help from some little friends help her avoid big trouble?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E84 A Plan and a Promise - Part 1
programme.desc: The Friendship Cup heats up as Yugo and Celina tear through the tricky twists and turns of a transforming duel track!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E85 A Plan and a Promise - Part 2
programme.desc: Yugo’s in for a bumpy ride as he’s forced to zigzag his way across a duel track that’s been mapped for mayhem by Roget!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Furious over Celina's failure at the Friendship Cup, Roget sends a squad of Sector Security to seize her.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E87 The Many Dimensions of Yuya
programme.desc: Yuya’s battle with Crow takes a turn for the worse when Roget takes control of Yuya’s mind!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Crow gets a crash course on double crossing when Yuya pulls a U-turn on their friendship!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Obelisk Force has invaded New Domino City to capture Zuzu and Celina! Can Yuya and his friends stop this unstoppable force?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S02 : E90 Down With the Underground
programme.desc: Barrett has returned to snatch Celina back to Duel Academy – unless the Lancers can stop him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Barrett has chained up Yuya and his monsters! Can Yuya break his shackles before Barrett breaks away with Celina?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya’s battle with Barrett comes to a shocking conclusion when a mind-controlled madman drops into their duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: It’s Jack’s most dangerous duel ever as he takes on Roget’s maniacal minion - Sergey!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Can Jack Atlas best Sergey, when Sergey combines the best of man and machine?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Roget declares himself leader of New Domino City! Can the Lancers overthrow this madman, or will Roget’s Sector Security end any chances they have?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The Friendship Cup finale is finally here! Jack and Yuya square off to see who will become New Domino City’s newest champion!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Jack pushes Yuya to his limits in the Friendship Cup finale! Does Yuya have the dueltaining skills to dethrone the Master of Faster, or will Jack’s rule reign supreme?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: With the City on the edge of their seats, a new champion is about to be crowned! But who will sit in the winner’s circle: Yuya or Jack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The Friendship Cup may be over, but trouble sure isn’t! Roget is planning to take Zuzu to Duel Academy!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya reaches a new place - Heartland City, the hometown of Yuto and Shay in the Xyz Dimension along with Sylvio and Gong. There they meet Duel Academy soldiers and an independent warrior from that dimension.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 The Edge of the World
programme.desc: Yuma misplaces the the Emperor's Key that was an important momento from his parents. He and Astral look high and low for it, but they just can't seem to find it. While they look, Astral is curious as to how the Emperor's Key is related to Yuma's father. Yuma starts talking about various memories from his childhood that he remembers about his dad. Yuma's Never-Give-Up Spirit "Kattobingu" was born from a promise he made with his father.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Roots of the Problem
programme.desc: Yuma safely recovers "Number 96: Black Mist" from a man. Tetsuo, who witnessed the Duel, takes note that Yuma seems suddenly more brutal in his strategy, and ends up in a fight with him. Not having reconciled in over 2 days, suddenly Number 96 swallows Yuma and Astral up!! To rescue Yuma and Astral from Number 96, Tetsuo fights the Numbers for the first time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Battle with the Bot
programme.desc: As they head home from class, Yuma and his friends meet Lilly who becomes their friend. However, after the robot is reprogrammed to its former self, Yuma duels Lilly in order to help regain her memories.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: In order to protect Yuma's Key from Kite, Shark faces him in a Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Hunting Down the Hunter - Part 1
programme.desc: While Yuma seeks for his Key, Astral duels against Kite to defend the Number cards he possesses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Hunting Down the Hunter - Part 2
programme.desc: Despite being unable to fight against the immense power of Galaxy-Eyes Photon Dragon, Astral, his resolve stern due to Feeling the Flow, continues a desperate combo of Offense and Defense. But when he finally gives up against Kite who keeps attacking him over and over, Yuma appears and the mysterious ZEXAL power activates...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: One morning, Yuma heads to school, and while talking to his friends, time stops. He sees three suns shining in the sky. Together with Astral, they both shiver from a fear they do not understand, causing Yuma to run off to find out what possibly could have happened. At that time, Kite, using Dr. Faker's technology, retraces Astral's memories and invites Yuma to the World Duel Carnival.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Let the Duels Begin
programme.desc: The World Duel Carnival, where Duelists from around the world will wage heated battles, is swiftly approaching. Yuma, seeking to fulfill his dream of becoming "Duel Champion", excitedly rushes to the tournament. But what will Yuma do when he has no Heart Pieces, which serve as the proof of participation for the WDC? Meanwhile, Mr. Heartland and Kite make their preparations to gather the Numbers that are likely to assemble before them in this tournament.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma's first opponent in the World Duel Carnival is the soccer kid, Striker. Striker transforms the surrounding stadium with his Field Spell Card, as the Duel kicks off. With his "Offside Trap", Striker brilliantly seals Yuma's strategies, while his teammate monsters use teamwork to frantically keep beating Yuma up with a combo of offense and defense and with such sheer strength, it seems as if Striker's victory is decided...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: While looking for an opponent to Duel, Yuma meets a boy named Cody, who loves construction equipment, at a construction site. Yuma, interested in the construction equipment Deck Cody uses, challenges him to a Duel. However, Cody Xyz Summons his "Digvorzhak, King of Heavy Industry".

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: While looking for an opponent to Duel, Yuma meets a boy named Cody, who loves construction equipment, at a construction site. Yuma, interested in the construction equipment Deck Cody uses, challenges him to a Duel. However, Cody Xyz Summons his "Digvorzhak, King of Heavy Industry".

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E101 Realm of The Cipher Dragon
programme.desc: Gongenzaka and Sawatari fight against the mysterious Kaito, who believes them to be agents of Academia. As he summons his fearsome Galaxy Eyes Cipher Dragon, Yuto notes that something has changed in Kaito.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Kaito begins a merciless assault against Yuya with his powerful Galaxy Eyes deck. With Yuto's spirit on his side, Yuya tries to match Kaito's indomitable spirit with both Odd Eyes Pendulum Dragon and Dark Rebellion Xyz Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Kaito begins a merciless assault against Yuya with his powerful Galaxy Eyes deck. With Yuto's spirit on his side, Yuya tries to match Kaito's indomitable spirit with both Odd Eyes Pendulum Dragon and Dark Rebellion Xyz Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E103 Rise of the Resistance
programme.desc: Yuya and the others meet the Xyz Resistance, who discuss how Heartland fell to ruin and Yusho's mysterious connection to them. Elsewhere, in the Fusion Dimension, Yuzu flees Academia soldiers when someone unexpected comes to her rescue.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E104 Rumble in the Rubble
programme.desc: Yusho explains what happened during his disappearance to Yuzu while in the Fusion Dimension. Back in Heartland, Yuya comes across an angry youth with a grudge against his Dueltaining style as Yuto refuses to stand by any longer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Shun is determined to convince Kaito to rejoin the Resistance despite Kaito's adamant refusal. As the former friends cannot convince each other either way, they decide all they can do is fight against each other.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yusho reveals that three years ago he learned of the Arc Area Project and Academia's machinations, going on a journey to stop Leo's plans. Yuri arrives at the You Show Duel School to stamp out the resistance against Academia.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Allen and Sayaka try to fight Kaito only to end up facing Grace and Gloria Tyler, two of Academia's strongest enforcers. Having no choice but to fight, they face off against the Tyler's Amazoness deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: As Sawatari and Gongenzaka both fail to defeat the Tyler sisters, Yuya and Shun arrive to meet their challenge. In the face of their near perfect combo, Yuya must not give into his rage and defeat his powerful foes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: As Sawatari and Gongenzaka both fail to defeat the Tyler sisters, Yuya and Shun arrive to meet their challenge. In the face of their near perfect combo, Yuya must not give into his rage and defeat his powerful foes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya and the others try to return to the Resistance base when they are attacked by the Obelisk Force. They try to face the power of the Obelisk Force when Shun becomes gravely injured during the battles.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Academia's enforcer Edo Phoenix challenges Yuya to a rematch. Torn between his allegiance to the Professor and his spirit of Dueltaining, a confused Edo is determined to crush Yuya and the ghost of Yusho that haunts him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: As their duel goes on, Edo only becomes more conflicted of where his allegiances lie. Seeing Edo suffer, Yuya is determined to remind him how fun dueling can be and begins his greatest Dueltaining performance yet.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Convincing Edo, the Tyler twins, and the rest of the forces in Heartland to join their side, Yuya and the other Lancers prepare to head to the Fusion Dimension to find their friends and restore everyone who has been turned into a card.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya encounters his old foe from the Junior Youth Championship, Kachidoki. Kachidoki continues to use violent tactics and powerful Fusions in his Action Duels as Yuya tries to return a smile to his heart.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E114 All Duel Hands on Deck
programme.desc: Yuya and co board a ship to Duel Academy when Dennis catches up to them, aiming to defeat Yusho once and for all. A still vengeful Kaito meets Dennis's challenge as the two unleash their greatest monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Serena, who appeared before the Lancers, suddenly betrays them and captures Yuzu while Yuya is forced to fight Captain Solo. Caught between useless cards and Solo's lock deck, things seem hopeless when more allies suddenly arrive.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yugo meets with up the others and agree to work together against Academia. Yugo and Kaito head to the towers where Rin and Ruri are being held captive, only to face the guardians Apollo and Diana.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E117 Grip of the Parasite
programme.desc: The Doctor has brainwashed Ruri and Rin, leading them to fight against Yugo and Kaito. Meanwhile, Reiji recounts how all of Yuya's counterparts as well as all the bracelet girls are part of Leo's ultimate plan: Revival Zero.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E118 Survival Of The Fittest
programme.desc: Yuya and the Lancers finally make it the Academy, but they are captured and thrown into a wild battle royale against the Obelisk Force. However, a mysterious enemy in the royale begins wiping out friend and foe alike.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Allie is looking to make a big splash at the Arc League Championship, but she soon finds herself in over her head! Can Allie's deck of fishy friends turn the tides, or will her mysterious opponent sink her chances of winning?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The wild duelist known as Battle Beast crushes his fellow Academy students and even turns Crow and Tsukikage into cards. Yuya and Gongenzaka arrive to face the challenge of their insane foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E121 Taming of The BB
programme.desc: Jack appears out of nowhere and joins Yuya in fighting against Battle Beast. Battle Beast's instructor, Sanders, joins in the duel as well to show the power and glory of the Academy to the Lancers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Battle Beast continues his rampage against friend and foe alike. Sensing nothing but rage and anger in Battle Beast's heart, Yuya is determined to show him how fun dueling can actually be and aims to purge his demons.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Asuka stays behind to fight Yuri while Sora and the others go on ahead. Yuri uses a different deck and fights Asuka, who tries to reach out a helping hand to Yuri. That's when Yuri reveals the real reason why he does what he does.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya comes across Ruri, who is still under the control of the Doctor's parasites. Yuya attempts to fight off Ruri, made harder when Serena joins the fight. Yuto decides to take control and face the two girls.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E125 Rise Of The Parasites
programme.desc: Yuya and Yuto are struggling in their battle against Ruri and Serena and their Parasite Queen. The Doctor attempts to take control of Yuya using a parasite as well, but that only awakens the rage inside of Yuya once again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo Akaba reveals to Yusho Sakaki how the four dimensions came to be.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo continues his story about how Zarc destroyed the original world. Leo's daughter Ray used four cards to stop Zarc and split the world into the four current worlds. He then reveals the true nature of Yuya, Yuzu, and the Arc Area Project.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo begins his final plan to fuse the dimensions and revive his daughter Ray. Reiji and Yuya team up to take down Leo, with Yuya resolving not to let Zarc be revived. Yusho realizes that even this is part of a larger enemy's plan.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo's plan gets further and further to completion, which causes the evil inside of Yuya to emerge once more. Yusho stops the duel and realizes that Zarc's influence is hovering over everything, including Yuya's other counterparts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yugo and Yuri being their duel, with Zarc's shared influence forcing them into battle. To stop Zarc's revival, Kaito and Edo join the battle as well to hold back Yuri's powerful Fusion Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: While Yuri and Yugo continue their savage battle, Reira starts hearing the voice of Ray. Aiming to make sure Ray is revived, Reira stands against Reiji and the siblings begin a duel with each other.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Reiji manages to defeat Reira, continuing on to fight Leo. Elsewhere, Yuri absorbs Yugo and aims to defeat Yuya so that Zarc can be completed. Yusho stands in for his son to fight the depraved youth instead.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yusho's advanced Dueltaining manages to push Yuri into a corner and bring Yuya back to his old self. But Yuri is determined to complete Zarc's revival and has one nasty surprise in store for Yusho.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Seeing his father carded in front of his eyes, Yuya's rage reaches a boiling point as he accepts Yuri's challenge. But not only does he have to contend with Yugo and Yuri's dragons, but Zarc's ever growing influence over him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The four dimensions start to fuse together as Yuya continues to struggle against Yuri. Forced to discard his trump card, things seem hopeless. Yuya's friends then arrive to encourage him to keep fighting no matter what.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E136 A Most Brutal Duel
programme.desc: Yuya absorbs all of his counterparts and reclaimed his true form as Supreme King Z-ARC. Starting to lay waste to the Fusion Dimension, Sora and Edo challenge Zarc to try and reach out to Yuya's spirit.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The four dimensions continue to unite as Zarc effortlessly crushes Sora and Edo. Kaito and Shun continue the fight against Zarc while people from Heartland and Neo Domino City start appearing in the Fusion Dimension.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Gongenzaka and Jack fight against Zarc next, trying their best to reach out to Yuya's soul buried in Zarc's darkness. A revived Crow and Sawatari decide to join in when Zarc's Supreme King Dragons swarm the field.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Crow notices that Zarc is starting to lose his composure, leading him and Sawatari to up their game against Zarc's dragons. As dimensional integration is getting closer to completion, Reiji tries to convince his dad to stop Zarc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E140 A Ray of Hope
programme.desc: Ray's soul possesses Reira so she can battle against Zarc alongside Reiji. Zarc boasts that he is the creator of Pendulum Summon, but Ray is determined to stop him once and for all using the four natural energy cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E141 Swinging Back into Action
programme.desc: Things have seemingly returned to normal in the Pendulum Dimension, but Yuya gets the feeling that something is missing. Reiji has him duel against Tsukikage to restore his memories and make him finish the Lancer's goal for good.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The battle royale continues. As Yuya keeps fighting, his memories start flooding back to him. Yuzu's dad suddenly remembers too as the rest of the world slowly begins to remember the Lancers and the battle against Zarc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Anna Kaboom attempts to kill Yuma with a cannon. He negotiates with her and they Duel instead so that Anna can try to take her revenge. Their past history is not what it initially seems.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Tombo Tillbitty Duels people, defeating them with his "Basket Rule" and takes their Heart Pieces. Dextra and Nistro appear near one of the defeated Duelists. They see he has vegetables stuffed in his mouth, and Dextra sees blood on his shirt. Dextra inspects closer, and licks it up, telling the disgusted Nistro it's just tomato juice.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Life Is a Carnival - Part 1
programme.desc: Charlie McCay steals "Number 7: Lucky Straight" from a gallery. Kari, who has past history with Charlie, sends Yuma after him. He and Astral witness the power of the "Lucky Straight" when Charlie performs a One Turn Kill on a World Duel Carnival competitor. Charlie makes his escape, stealing more cards in the process, including one of Yuma's "Numbers".

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 Life Is a Carnival - Part 2
programme.desc: Charlie McCay escapes on the single-track railroad and Yuma starts the Duel. But Charlie's "Number 7: Lucky Straight" possesses amazing luck. If he hits the jackpot by rolling the dice, then Charlie's Life Points will become 100,000. On the verge of giving up when all of his attempts to stop that strong luck become fruitless, Yuma discovers an unexpected strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The second day of WDC starts. More energetic than ever, Bronk and Caswell decide to battle the Asian Duel Champion, Quattro. According to these two, the gentleman Quattro has a respectable Duel aesthetic, which is also admired by many Duelists from their hearts. Witnessed by Yuma, Astral, Tori and Trey, the Battle Royal between Quattro, Bronk, and Caswell starts, but Quattro soon reveals his true side which remained hidden until now.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Shark is determined to have his revenge on Quattro, but Quattro's younger brother Trey snares Shark with a Duel Anchor and allows Quattro to leave. Trey's mission from Vetrix and Quinton is to give a "Number" to Shark, which he accomplishes. Shark is able to resist completely being controlled by the "Number" and defeats Trey.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Shark is determined to have his revenge on Quattro, but Quattro's younger brother Trey snares Shark with a Duel Anchor and allows Quattro to leave. Trey's mission from Vetrix and Quinton is to give a "Number" to Shark, which he accomplishes. Shark is able to resist completely being controlled by the "Number" and defeats Trey.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: After Yuma laments over Shark dueling in revenge against Quattro, he's irritated by everything that's going on and ends up getting into a squabble with Tori. Meanwhile, elsewhere in the tournament, a photographer named Cameron has won Duel after Duel against Duelists with the help of terrifying ability of his that leaves them in terror. Cameron's superpower is apparently a gift to be able to take photographs of the future. With Cameron's "Future Photographs", his opponent's entire strategy is laid bare before him, allowing him to relentlessly defeat Duelists.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma is having trouble in his Duel against Cameron, and the dangerous future of Tori encountering an accident is continuously approaching. Then, "Number 25: Force Focus", controlled by Cameron, finally shows up. Yuma cannot win without Summoning "Utopia", but according to the prophecy, Yuma will lose in this Duel for sure if he Summons it. Under this desperate circumstance, in order to grasp the future within his own hands, Yuma delivers a bold strategy!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: In order to prevent Flip from being disqualified from the WDC, Yuma Duels against Dextra and Nistro. Meanwhile, Astral faces against an old enemy inside Emperor's Key.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The Duel between Yuma against Dextra and Nistro continues. Due to their combination, Yuma is pushed into a corner, even after Summoning "Utopia" thanks to Astral. However due to the bonds between the two, a reversal occurs!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Reiji reveals that Zarc is still alive and Reira is barely holding back his malevolence. The world must be united and Yuya must purge Zarc's evil once and for all. Yuya is unsure. but Gongenzaka attempts to ignite his fighting spirit.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya arrives in the Xyz Dimensions with Dennis as his next opponent. Threatening to turn the traumatized citizens of Heartland into cards again, Dennis forces Yuya into a duel against him and his Xyz/Fusion mix.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya arrives in the Fusion Dimension where he finds a distraught Shun. Like with Yuya's counterparts, Ruri and the others have not been resurrected following Ray's revival. Yuya tries to calm Shun down only to end up the target of his fury.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E146 One Way Street to Defeat
programme.desc: Jack appears to taunt Yuya over his fear of using his counterpart's dragons in fear of summoning Zarc. Unable to accomplish anything as is, Yuya challenges Jack to a duel while Reiji makes it so everyone can watch the battle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya finally listens to his other selves and summons all four of his dragons to defeat Jack. However, there is one final challenge before him in order to become a Dueltainer and purge Zarc: his rival and friend Reiji Akaba.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The curtain is about to fall for the last time. The final battle between Yuya and Reiji rages on. Dragons face off against D/D/D as the whole world watches. What will be the final fate of Yuya, Yuzu, and all four dueling dimensions?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma's Heart Pieces are stolen by Pip, and Cathy Duels to get them back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: To heal his little brother Hart's illness, Kite rigorously continues hunting the "Number" cards. Seeing his older brother exhausted, Hart sneaks away from Heartland and into Heartland City, and by chance meets Yuma, Astral and Tori. Amazingly, Hart can see Astral, who in turn seems to know Hart's name. Moved by Astral's wish, Yuma takes Hart to his home. After Hart escaped from the Heartland Tower, he is chased by Dextra and Nistro in a helicopter which results in them going to a tower in order to meet Kite. Soon after, a helicopter appears, in which Hart, Yuma and Tori think it is Nistro and Dextra, resulting in Hart using his Dark Energy. After Yuma calms Hart down with a piece of...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Hart is kidnapped by the Vetrix Family and so Kite and Yuma join forces. However when they find their hideout, they're forced into a Tag Duel against Quattro and Trey.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The Tag Duel of Yuma and Kite against Quattro and Trey begins! Kite duels essentially on his own, even to the extent of hurting all of his opponents, including Yuma. However, Yuma on his part, defends himself and Kite from Trey and Quattro's damaging combination. Furthermore, even with "Galaxy-Eyes Photon Dragon" being Summoned, it falls victim to Quattro and Trey's trap.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Due to the terror of Trey and Quattro's strategy, Kite and Yuma are pushed into a corner. However at the edge of defeat, Hart's feelings awaken a new power inside Kite. With it, he Summons the monster created by the powerful bonds between them, "Neo Galaxy-Eyes Photon Dragon".

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 Rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Yuma finds himself in conflict about the "Number" cards, knowing that both Kite and Astral have their reasons for obtaining them. However upon learning that his father is still alive, Yuma tries to leave in search for him. Roku appears to help Yuma with his situation.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The third day of the preliminaries begins with Yuma looking for one more Heart Piece. Meanwhile, Nistro who wants to defeat Yuma and Astral, enters the tournament along with Dextra. Consequently while collecting Heart Pieces, Nistro challenges Nelson Andrews.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: After watching the quick Duel between Yuma against Shark, Trey visits Yuma's house in order to learn more about him. He finds a picture of Yuma's parents, and starts thinking about how his family used to be. He becomes very upset and cries, then runs out of Yuma's house. Yuma goes after him, but then Trey gives him a map, and leaves.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Using new powers given to him by Vetrix, Trey is able to break Yuma and Astral's combination. After capturing Astral, Trey makes Yuma forget about "kattobingu" leading him into further trouble as this makes the latter unable to see Astral or Emperor's Key.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Due to Trey's power, Yuma forgets all about "Kattobing" and ends up forced into a corner. However Kazuma, helps Yuma continue the fierce Duel against Trey by using the power of the "Numbers" and Emperor's Key to break Trey's spell. Lastly Astral's last hope helps Yuma make a comeback by using "Utopia".

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The Duel between Yuma and Trey comes to an end as in order to stop "Atlandis", Trey cooperates with Yuma in order to bring Astral back. Once that occurs, the power of ZEXAL is used once more in order to Summon "ZW - Phoenix Bow" and defeat "Atlandis".

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma and his friends get all decked out for the event of the year - the World Duel Carnival Finals party! But when Yuma forgets his invite, can he find a way into the festivities, or will he be forced to hit the road and head home early?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: It’s time for the World Duel Carnival Finals! But prepare for a world of twists and turns because the finalists will be dueling on a roller coaster! Can Yuma handle the ups and downs of the competition, or will he be sent for a loop?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: To assess Yuma’s dueling skills, Vetrix hires the Triad of Terror, a trio of cunning card sharks, to triple team him! Yuma better figure out a way to roll through this threesome before his dueling goes off the rails!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The World Duel Carnival takes a dark turn as the finalists descend into the Dragon’s Den – a dark and dangerous duel track that will bring defeat for many a duelist! Can Yuma make his way through the treacherous track, or will the Dragon’s Den deliver a knockout blow?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S02 : E54 Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The heat's on when Vetrix and Dextra duel in the jungle to decide who moves on to the World Duel Carnival semifinals!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Quinton takes a timeout during his duel against Kite to reveal the long hidden mystery about Yuma’s father’s disappearance!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Quinton and Kite’s confrontation in the cosmos comes to a climactic conclusion!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Heart of the Cards
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi’s Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 The Gauntlet Is Thrown
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa’s soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Journey to the Duelist Kingdom
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister’s eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi’s deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Into The Hornet's Nest
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they’ve ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he’s to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 The Ultimate Great Moth
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil’s first wave of Duel Monsters, Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power every turn! Can Yugi find a way to destroy this winged beast before it destroys him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai’s secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Attack from the Deep
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp’s crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba’s brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother’s company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Duel With a Ghoul
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba. But with his best cards resting at the bottom of the ocean, Yugi must discover a new strategy to survive fake Kaiba’s powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Give up the Ghost
programme.desc: Yugi defeats Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends’ help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own. But as Rex Raptor’s relentless dinos destroys Joey’s best Duel Monsters, will Tristan’s card remind him that with his friends, he is never alone in battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: Red-Eyes B. Dragon! Joey must figure out the secret of Yugi’s gift, the Time Wizard card, without Yugi’s help or he’s taking the next boat out of Duelist Kingdom!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Evil Spirit of the Ring
programme.desc: Yugi’s classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring’s dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves! Not only must Yugi battle to avoid becoming a permanent part of the card game, but also free Bakura’s soul from the Millennium Ring’s control!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 The Light at the End of the Tunnel
programme.desc: Pegasus’s hired duelist PaniK cheats Mai of all her Star Chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when PaniK’s Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes PaniK: “I’ll finish you in three turns.” Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 The Scars of Defeat
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus! Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba’s Blue-Eyes White Dragon and Joey’s Red-Eyes B. Dragon holds the answers!

programme.title: The Weekend
programme.desc: A woman discovers a heart-breaking secret. She plans a steamy intimate weekend with her husband, but this weekend is full of questions, anger, rage and blood. She will not stop until she gets her answers.

programme.title: AMC Red Carpet - Mother's Love
programme.desc: AMC Red Carpet moments brings you exclusive red carpet interviews with Nollywood stars at the premieres of top Nollywood movies and other industry events such as award ceremonies.

programme.title: Burning Pain
programme.desc: After his wife becomes sick and unable to move properly, Michael takes on the extra responsibility of caring for her. Is he doing this out of the goodness of his heart or is there something nefarious going on behind close doors?

programme.title: Bennie
programme.desc: Bennie, a mother of three, knows her time is near after months of keeping her ovarian cancer a secret. To test her husband’s ability to take care of their children when she’s gone, she disappears without a trace, leaving him alone to cater for the children.

programme.title: Scars Ep 5
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Scars Ep 6
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Scars Ep 7
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Scars Ep 8
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: AMC Red Carpet - Mother's Love
programme.desc: AMC Red Carpet moments brings you exclusive red carpet interviews with Nollywood stars at the premieres of top Nollywood movies and other industry events such as award ceremonies.

programme.title: Love and Everything In-Between
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Love And Everything In Between tells the story of Amanda and Jude and how their unlikely meeting spins into something beautiful. When Amanda is robbed on her first day in Lagos and has no where to go, rich boy Jude offers her a place to stay in his family home, which leads them to begin to work together.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Beneath the seemingly perfect marriage of Lisa and John lies a web of lies and betrayal which begins to unravel when infidelity surfaces and a shocking kidnapping throws their world into chaos.

programme.title: Silhouette
programme.desc: A woman dissatisfied in her marriage complicates things further when she begins an affair with her cook despite being warned against it by everyone around her.

programme.title: Family Friends
programme.desc: The feud between two families has a devastating effect on the relationship between two best friends.

programme.title: Pressured
programme.desc: A woman is regarded as a spinster after a series of failed romances and feeling pressure from all around her to settle down with the next man that comes along.

programme.title: 31 Days
programme.desc: Two young corpers find themselves in the unknown when they are assigned to a small village for their youth service and try to teach new ways of doing things that defy the village's traditions.

programme.title: In Bloom - Period
programme.desc: A collection of 5 short films addressing gender equality issues such as period poverty, child marriage, gender-based violence, HIV and economic empowerment. First Short: "Period" - written and directed by Nicole Teeny (USA). Like many of her classmates at her underserved school, Fay cannot afford menstrual products, so she sets out on a crusade to get them for free.

programme.title: In Bloom - Alta
programme.desc: A collection of 5 short films addressing gender equality issues such as period poverty, child marriage, gender-based violence, HIV and economic empowerment. Second Short: "Alta", written and directed by Priyanka Banerjee (India). A defiant teenager refusing to come out of the bathroom forces her helpless father to seek help to reason with the girl, but things take a turn when their true relationship is revealed.

programme.title: In Bloom - Aféfé
programme.desc: A collection of 5 short films addressing gender equality issues such as period poverty, child marriage, gender-based violence, HIV and economic empowerment. Fifth Short: "Aféfé," written and directed by Dolapo 'LowlaDee' Adeleke (Nigeria). When her elderly and ailing mother-in-law moves in unexpectedly, life for an impassioned local beautician takes a frightening turn.

programme.title: Love Box
programme.desc: Two long-term unmarried lovers relocate to Lagos for greener pastures and experience relationship with other people before settling down. Their affair relationship becomes threatened as they begin to make new friends and discover new lifestyles.

programme.title: Zuriel's Diary
programme.desc: A heart-breaking family secret is unearthed when words in a diary come back to haunt them.

programme.title: Samantha
programme.desc: An estranged couple decide to get together, along with their new partners, to discuss the custody and well-being of the estranged couple's daughter, Samantha. Things start to go awry as old wounds are reopened and old feelings, good and bad start to resurface.

programme.title: The Governor's Daughter
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. A high-flying woman, Mrs. Helen Onoja, is fixated on making sure her only son, Felix, not only marries from a class as high as hers, but specifically a governor’s daughter. She goes all out to arrange for him to date the spoilt daughter of her childhood friend, whose father happens to be the incumbent governor of Kogi State, ignoring the fact that Felix is in love with another woman, Abike. Meanwhile Felix’s relationship with Abike suffers because he is unable to stand up to his domineering mother.

programme.title: Undoing Perfect
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Jude, Theresa and their beautiful daughter Uju seem like the perfect family, but Theresa has a dark secret which she does everything to protect. Everything changes when Uju falls ill and requires immediate blood transfusion. Jude gets the shock of his life as he realizes he is not Uju’s father. "Undoing perfect" is a contemporary story of love, trust, betrayal and hurt, a sincere story of love and marriage.

programme.title: Faults and Blames
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. When the baby of a young couple goes missing, long-buried resentment and bitterness rears its ugly head, causing damage that can never be rectified.

programme.title: Check-Mate
programme.desc: Jada, suspicious about her husband's reason for always being tired, decides to hire an escort to test his fidelity. Things don't go according to plan, and she puts their relationship into jeopardy.

programme.title: Demands
programme.desc: The lives of two couples is forever entwined as they deal with lack of commitment, infidelity and unexpected pregnancies.

programme.title: The Hangout S5 Ep7
programme.desc: The Hangout returns for its fifth season with a group of opinionated, social media-savvy millennials who debate controversial topics on love, sex, friendship, and more.

programme.title: Faithful Sin
programme.desc: A philandering married woman causes problems for both hers and her neighbour's marriages when she gets pregnant and doesn't know who the father of her child may be.

programme.title: In Bloom - Aféfé
programme.desc: A collection of 5 short films addressing gender equality issues such as period poverty, child marriage, gender-based violence, HIV and economic empowerment. Fifth Short: "Aféfé," written and directed by Dolapo 'LowlaDee' Adeleke (Nigeria). When her elderly and ailing mother-in-law moves in unexpectedly, life for an impassioned local beautician takes a frightening turn.

programme.title: A Good Man
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. When two sisters fall in love with the same guy whom they met at the same time, their bond as sister is put to a test and there's a chance this might tear the family apart.

programme.title: Scars Ep 11
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Entangled
programme.desc: A once happy marriage starts to face crisis when the husband is promoted and starts having more responsibility at work, leaving his wife to believe he is now neglecting his family responsibilities.

programme.title: Sweet Pain
programme.desc: A man working hard to provide for his family faces conflict with his girlfriend when she tries to come in between him and his friend and business partner.

programme.title: Dark Horse
programme.desc: Imelda's father vehemently disapproves of her relationahip with her new boyfriend, causing a rift within their family. Is he just over-protective or is there something more sinister behind his behaviour?

programme.title: Fallen Out
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Pascal is a loving husband and father, but with his wife working in Canada, he feels like a single father to their twin teenage daughters, Rachel and Vivian. With no proper supervision the girls get up to no good behind their father’s back and when he tries to discipline them, they do the unthinkable in an effort to escape the boundaries set.

programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Shaffy's Sister
programme.desc: Shaffy’s sister, Daisy, struggles to interact with her family and find her place in society after spending years in prison.

programme.title: Anatomy of Deception
programme.desc: A district attorney who, tapped to replace the outgoing mayor, is stalked by a man who engineers her fall from grace, leading her to push back and beat him at his own game.

programme.title: Another Man's Wife
programme.desc: After a tragic car accident, a family gets away to a remote mountain cabin to recover and rebuild their lives. During their vacation, a handsome man befriends them only to get revenge and destroy what is left of their fragile lives.

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: A podcast host who is cynical about love meets Jake, a charismatic and charming new caller.

programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are preparing for the big opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn, when a huge storm hits Bucks County. Brian agrees to return to Wall Street to boost their funds, while Jenny scrambles to keep the opening on time.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki has trouble building a case against Elana, a nightclub owner she knows is actually Medusa.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori is cooking for girls night and must figure out how to please both of her friends!

programme.title: The Song to My Heart
programme.desc: An organic tea shop owner helps a music sensation write lyrics for a new solo album.

programme.title: Game of Love
programme.desc: Ex-Wife Frances conspires with her grown children to force Jake to sell his cherished Seattle basketball team. Will game changing moves off the court help reignite romantic sparks?

programme.title: Undercover Angel
programme.desc: When a little girl prays for a miracle to help her recently divorced mother settle in their new town and fixer-upper house, an angel posing as a handyman, is sent down from heaven to help. While trying to accomplish his mission, the angel falls for the mother, ultimately forcing him into the unlikeliest of choices.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Widowed doctor Jessica vacations in Fiji with her daughter and finds love with resort owner Will.

programme.title: The Love Club: Lauren
programme.desc: Lauren faces divorce papers but has a feeling that it's not quite over, so she asks the Love Club for help.

programme.title: Abduction of Angie
programme.desc: Paramedic Miranda races to save her daughter Angie, who was kidnapped by Miranda's estranged father.

programme.title: Amber's Story
programme.desc: This is the true story of the kidnapping of Amber Hagerman and how her family came together to help other abducted children as a result of her tragedy; which resulted in a new system to help find missing children - The Amber Alert.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki finds a necromancer and his assistant using dead athletes for a hideous underground sporting event.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Josh Flagg to create a backyard summer camp-out with the Troop Beverly Hills theme.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop owners despise each other but begin to fall in love while sending each other messages on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Bad Date Chronicles
programme.desc: Jeri Jones runs the popular website ‘Bad Date Chronicles’ where daters can go to anonymously post horrible date experiences. Realizing he’s the subject of one of the posts, rival blogger Jack Collins dares Jeri to three dates in an attempt to prove he’s not such a bad guy after all.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: When show host Chef Betty has an unexpected injury, Kelly hires hot-headed Chef Stephen as a replacement.

programme.title: Deadly Vows
programme.desc: Pastry chef Helena poisons men who don't meet her standards, but Helena's fiancé's sister smells danger.

programme.title: Blueprint to the Heart
programme.desc: A TV host must choose between chasing ratings or following her heart when she falls for a handsome guest.

programme.title: InstaPsycho
programme.desc: When a selfie turns fatal, a woman must protect her teen daughter from a friend obsessed with social media.

programme.title: Sugar Baby Murder
programme.desc: A new executive assistant to a business tycoon learns that a life of luxury can come at a deadly price.

programme.title: Love on Trend
programme.desc: A fashion blogger gets a new number and steps into a glamorous life, but falls for her predecessor’s ex.

programme.title: Kauas pilvet karkaavat
programme.desc: Kauas pilvet karkaavat kertoo helsinkiläispariskunnasta. Raitiovaununkuljettaja ja perinteikkään ravintola Dubrovnikin hovimestari menettävät työnsä, mutta eivät toivoaan Aki Kaurismäen (Le Havre) Suomi-trilogian ensimmäisessä osassa.

programme.title: The Quiet Roar
programme.desc: Marianne (Evabritt Strandberg) on 68-vuotias nainen, jolla on parantumaton sairaus. Ahdistuneena hän hakeutuu terapiaan klinikalle, jossa häntä hoidetaan psilosybiinilla (LSD:llä) ja hoitaja Eva (Hanna Schygulla) johdattaa hänet meditaatioon.

programme.title: JP ja Murtovaras
programme.desc: Sallikkalan kuntaa piinaa sarja murtovarkauksia, ja luvattomalle yöseikkailulle lähtenyt lapsikolmikko luulee nähneensä varkaan itse teossa! Nyt on perustettava salapoliisitoimisto ja ratkaistava juttu!

programme.title: Ykköset Ja Nollat - Osa 1
programme.desc: Kriitikoiden ylistämä brutaali gangsteridraama Johan Renckiltä! FBI ja Interpol saavat vihiä suuresta luottokorttisotkusta, ja narkkari Sebbe napataan kiinni epäiltynä. Poliisin aloittaessa kuulustelun he saavat kuulla uskomattoman tarinan Göteborgin alamaailmasta.

programme.title: Lindell - Orkesterimonttu - Osa 1
programme.desc: Elämänsä parhaan esityksen jälkeen oopperassa ensiviulisti Siv Ellen Blad murhataan julmasti. Rikoskomisario Cato Isaksen saa nopeasti selville, että hän oli joutunut postiryöstön kohteeksi. Piileekö siinä yhteys?

programme.title: Lindell - Orkesterimonttu - Osa 2
programme.desc: Elämänsä parhaan esityksen jälkeen oopperassa ensiviulisti Siv Ellen Blad murhataan julmasti. Rikoskomisario Cato Isaksen saa nopeasti selville, että hän oli joutunut postiryöstön kohteeksi. Piileekö siinä yhteys?

programme.title: She's Wild Again Tonight
programme.desc: Ainutlaatuisessa olohuonedraamassa pääsemme indie-yhtye Mando Diaon entisen jäsenen Gustaf Norénin ja iranilaissyntyisen näyttelijän ja laulajan Shima Niavaranin päiden sisään. She’s Wild Again Tonight hämärtää toden, esityksen ja silkan fiktion eroja.

programme.title: Arvottomat
programme.desc: Arvottomat on ajaton kuvaus siitä kuinka Pikkurikollinen Manne, maalaispoika Harri ja kaunis Veera ajavat Volgalla läpi suomalaismaisemien, poliisien ja gangsterien roikkuessa herkeämättä kintereillä.

programme.title: Liza Marklund: Punainen Susi
programme.desc: Ruotsalainen iltapäivälehti Kvällspressen on määrännyt rikostoimittaja Annika Bengtzonin tutkimaan monimutkaista murhajuttua. Uhri on toimittajakollega, ja tapauksen ainoa silminnäkijä on 15-vuotias poika.

programme.title: Le Havre
programme.desc: Parhaan elokuvan Jussi-palkinnon voittaja ja myös kansainvälisesti palkittu elokuva, voitti myös 2011 Cannesin elokuvajuhlilla, elokuvakriitikkojen järjestön Fiprescin palkinnon, parhaan koiranäyttelijän sekä ekumeenisen tuomariston palkinnot.

programme.title: Bitchkram
programme.desc: Kristin laskee päiviä ylioppilaskirjoituksiin, jolloin hän voi jättää pikkukaupungin ja manipuloivan sisarensa unelmiensa New Yorkia varten. Kaikki sujuu täydellisesti, ja paikallislehti julkaisee hänen kolumnejaan.

programme.title: Klaani - tarina Sammakoiden suvusta
programme.desc: Klaani on rikollissuvun tarina, jossa Mika Kaurismäki käsittelee perinteisen eeppisen muodon välityksellä olemassaolon ehtoja, lain oikean ja väärän puolen häilyvällä rajalla. Sammakoitten perheen nuorin poika Aleksanteri on sukunsa valkoinen lammas.

programme.title: Boheemielämää
programme.desc: Boheemielämää kertoo kolmen taiteilijan tarinan. Kirjailija Marcel Marxin, taidemaalari Rodolfon ja säveltäjä Shaunardin, rakkauksien, töiden ja ainaisen rahapulan värittämään taiteilijaelämään pureutuva elokuva perustuu Henri Murgerin kuuluisaan samannimiseen romaaniin vuodelta 1851.

programme.title: Ykköset Ja Nollat - Osa 1
programme.desc: Kriitikoiden ylistämä brutaali gangsteridraama Johan Renckiltä! FBI ja Interpol saavat vihiä suuresta luottokorttisotkusta, ja narkkari Sebbe napataan kiinni epäiltynä. Poliisin aloittaessa kuulustelun he saavat kuulla uskomattoman tarinan Göteborgin alamaailmasta.

programme.title: Cha Cha Cha
programme.desc: Siltojen alla asusteleva alkoholisti Matti (Matti Pellonpää) on saamassa Amerikan tädiltään huomattavan perinnön, mutta miehen tulisi olla edustuskelpoinen tädin vierailun ajan. Matti kertoo tilanteesta autokauppiaana työskentelevälle ystävälleen, joka ehdottaa korvausta vastaan roolien vaihtoa.

programme.title: Winnerbäck
programme.desc: Lars Winnerbäck on lukeutunut Ruotsin suurimpiin artisteihin jo 15 vuotta, ja kuitenkin hän on se, josta tiedetään vähiten. Nyt tuskin 40 täyttänyt Winnerbäck viettää 20. taiteilijavuottaan.

programme.title: Laitakaupungin valot
programme.desc: Laitakaupungin valot kertoo yövartijana työskentelevästä Koistisesta, joka joutuu petoksen uhriksi. Laitakaupungin valot oli mukana vuoden 2006 Cannesin elokuvajuhlien kansainvälisessä kilpasarjassa. Elokuva palkittiin parhaan elokuvan Jussi-palkinnolla vuonna 2007.

programme.title: Liza Marklund: Nobelin Testamentti
programme.desc: Tukholman Nobel-juhliin livahtaa nainen, joka ampuu israelilaisen nobelistin ja Nobel-komitean puheenjohtajan keskellä tanssilattiaa.

programme.title: Lindell - Käärmeenkantaja - Del 1
programme.desc: Ensi hetkestä alkaen Käärmeenkantaja pitää katsojan otteessaan tässä järkyttävässä psykologisessa draamassa, jossa hulluuden logiikka ajaa tapahtumia kohti väistämätöntä kliimaksia. Sarjamurhaaja kulkee vapaana Oslossa.

programme.title: Rikos ja rangaistus
programme.desc: Rikos ja rangaistus on moderni tulkinta Dostojevskin kuuluisasta romaanista. Murhaajan (Markku Toikka) ja poliisin (Esko Nikkari, Mies vailla menneisyyttä) huimaava psykologinen kaksintaistelu tapahtuu öisen Helsingin sivukujilla ja lain tuolla puolen.

programme.title: White People
programme.desc: Alex (Vera Vitali) siepataan kadulla ruokakaupan edessä ja hänet viedään maanalaisiin tiloihin, joissa ihmiset odottavat vangittuina karkotustaan. Viktoria (Pernilla August, “Tähtien Sota: Episodi I – Pimeä uhka”) on operaation pomo, joka hallitsee miehistöään rautaisin ottein.

programme.title: Arvottomat
programme.desc: Arvottomat on ajaton kuvaus siitä kuinka Pikkurikollinen Manne, maalaispoika Harri ja kaunis Veera ajavat Volgalla läpi suomalaismaisemien, poliisien ja gangsterien roikkuessa herkeämättä kintereillä.

programme.title: Le Havre
